payload.blocked_reason: T02 (commit c7302cf) added close-intermediate to lint_plan.py VALID_TYPES and closing-shape logic but omitted CLOSE-INTERMEDIATE from CORRELATION_ID_RE. The regex currently accepts only RETRO|LESSONS|DOCS|PLAN|CLOSE as G<n>-<NAME> suffixes. Any feature using the template's G<n>-CLOSE-INTERMEDIATE IDs will fail lint's correlation-ID check (confirmed: CORRELATION_ID_RE.match('FEAT-2026-0000/G1-CLOSE-INTERMEDIATE') → False). correlation-ids.md lines 130-132 explicitly requires updating CORRELATION_ID_RE when adding a new closing type. Resolution: T02 needs a follow-on fix to add CLOSE-INTERMEDIATE to CORRELATION_ID_RE in lint_plan.py and update the pattern table + example in correlation-ids.md before T03's AC5 can pass. Out-of-scope references to legacy closing IDs also found in: gate-status/SKILL.md:81, feature-conversion/SKILL.md:90, correlation-ids.md:28-29,153-155 — recommend a follow-on hygiene WU to update those surfaces.
